heading: Obligated service
label: 7623 Obligated service

children.label: a
children.text: Each participant in the Tuition Reimbursement Program shall provide service in the full-time clinical practice of such participant’s profession as a full-time employee of the Department for the period of obligated service provided in the agreement of such participant entered into under .section 7603 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: A participant who on such participant’s course completion date is a full-time employee in the Veterans Health Administration shall be considered to have begun serving such participant’s period of obligated service on the course completion date.

children.label: c
children.text: Except in the case of a participant whose tuition was paid pursuant to , if a participant in the Tuition Reimbursement Program fails to successfully complete a course, no reimbursement will be provided and no period of obligated service will be incurred.section 7622(e) of this title

children.label: d
children.text: In the case of a participant whose tuition was paid pursuant to and who fails to complete the course involved, the period of obligation shall be of the same duration as it would have been if the participant had successfully completed the course and the course completion date shall be considered to be the date on which the participant’s failure becomes an established fact.section 7622(e) of this title

children.label: e
children.text: For the purposes of this section, the term “course completion date” means the date on which a participant in the Tuition Reimbursement Program completes such participant’s course of training under the program.
